creator: victoriggy@gmail.com
text:
(In reply to Gleb Smirnoff from comment #11)

Here is the tcpdump from my OSX client to 13.2-RC2

Victors-MacBook-Pro-2021:~ root# tcpdump -s0 -v port 80
